feynrl_input_shape: Short concept text or structured paper summary with title, key contributions, formulas, concepts, and scene suggestions.

likely_feynrl_output_shape.title: P3O: Batch-Adaptive Policy Optimization
likely_feynrl_output_shape.scene_count: 2-5 scenes for 60-120 seconds in MVP2; 1 scene for MVP1

scenes.name: ProblemSetup
scenes.description: Title card plus two policy distributions: old policy generated samples; new policy evaluates them. Arrows show stored old_logprobs becoming policy ratios.

scenes.name: EffectiveSampleSize
scenes.description: A small ratio table morphs from balanced ratios near 1 into a stale batch with one dominant ratio. The normalized ESS equation appears beside the table.

scenes.name: AdaptiveObjective
scenes.description: P3O objective pieces appear: capped score-function weight and behavioral KL weight scaled by 1 - ESS.

scenes.name: CodeAndTakeaway
scenes.description: Highlights calculate_ess and compute_policy_loss as implementation anchors, ending with a concise takeaway.

expected_strength: Most aligned with paper-to-video and reflection loop.
expected_weakness: Without our PaperCodeGraph it will mention code symbols only if we stuff them into the input summary.

feynrl_input_shape: One knowledge point string, optionally enriched with source-code hints inside the string.

likely_feynrl_output_shape.topic: Why P3O uses effective sample size to trust or distrust a replay batch

sections.title: Fresh vs stale samples
animations: Two policy boxes and replay buffer
Arrows from prompts to sampled responses

sections.title: ESS compresses ratio spread
animations: Gauge falls from high to low

sections.title: Adaptive update
animations: Cap line lowers as ESS drops

expected_strength: Good at educational topic storyboarding and visual layout feedback.
expected_weakness: Not paper-native; no native code-repo indexing; no no-render mode in current entrypoint.

feynrl_input_shape: Topic plus long context paragraph; can also use a one-row theorems_path JSON.

likely_feynrl_output_shape.topic: Batch-Adaptive Policy Optimization for RL Post-Training
likely_feynrl_output_shape.scene_style: Long-form theorem/concept explanation with XML scene outline and per-scene technical implementation plans.
scenes: Motivating failure: fixed clipping under stale replay
Policy ratio distribution as evidence of mismatch
P3O update rule and behavioral KL
Sync vs async rollout loop and final takeaway

expected_strength: Strong long-form planning, code generation, render retry, optional RAG/context learning.
expected_weakness: Designed for theorem understanding, not implementation grounding; TTS/Manim/TEA dependency stack is heavy.

feynrl_input_shape: Hand-authored scene class now; next target is PaperCodeGraph -> Scene IR.

current_feedback: Show how ESS impacts policy update

expected_strength: Actually renders today and already has probe/contact-sheet/VLM eval.
